comment: Enable config for the signalk-derived-data plugin (id 'derived-data'). Copied into the Signal K config volume (plugin-config-data/derived-data.json) by the signalk-derived init service if absent. Computes true wind + VMG from apparent wind + STW/heading/COG so polar coaching has TWS/TWA/TWD instead of nulls. On the boat this is one of several true-wind sources (Orca Core publishes heel-compensated true wind too); the collect-everything paradigm keeps all of them, distinguished by $source ('derived-data' here).
